gold_change_reason: Added missing cell bounds checking, whitespace trimming, charge validation, dedup in sequences_mapping, and handling of extra keys in header_dict.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include tests with rows missing optional columns.
Scaled executable cases must test trimming and charge validation.
Scaled executable cases must include repeated row processing to test dedup.
implementation_notes: Bounds checking added for all column accesses to handle rows shorter than header.
Whitespace stripped from peptide_name and charge_state using .strip().
Charge validation: empty, 'NA' (case-insensitive), or non-integer defaults to '0'.
Sequences mapping dedup: check if key already in list before appending.
Protein mapping only updated if ProteinName column exists and row has that cell non-empty.
Extra keys in header_dict are ignored gracefully because only known columns are accessed.
